description: Create a project named 'Westfield Manufacturing - ERP Implementation' in Odoo with timesheets enabled. The project must include four tasks with specific deadlines: 'Discovery & Requirements Gathering' (14 days from today), 'System Configuration & Customization' (45 days from today), 'Data Migration' (60 days from today), and 'User Training & Go-Live Support' (90 days from today). Record two timesheet entries for the 'Discovery & Requirements Gathering' task: 4.0 hours for 'Initial stakeholder interviews' and 2.5 hours for 'Current process documentation review'.
